name: SoundlessNightmare
short_description: Keep quiet and avoid making loud noises. Please refrain from making any sound for 10 minutes to enter a sweet dreamland. Of course, you can choose not to have a microphone!
detailed_description:
Notice before purchase: This is an extremely brief horror experience with no storyline at all!!! In the game, you will play the role of a child who is getting ready to go to sleep at night. Your goal is to make no sound within 10 minutes before going to bed! If you scream, the game will restart.

Of course, you can choose not to use the microphone and treat it as a speedrun game!

If you use the microphone, please pay attention to the sound indicator in the lower left corner of the screen. Make sure your voice doesn't exceed the red line.
